# Style alteration cell background based on ClinVar classification (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Style alteration cell background based on ClinVar classification
(Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_alteration_clinvar_style(data)
```

## Arguments

- data:

  The main data frame (passed via closure)

## Value

A function that can be used as a reactable cell renderer for the
SAMPLE_ALTERATION column, which checks the CLINVAR_CLASSIFICATION column
in the same row to determine background color and text styling.
